skills.name: Crushing Force
skills.desc: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted. Damage inflicted is proportional to enemy MAX HP.

skills.name: Belittle
skills.desc: Attacks all enemies. Places a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Crash Through
skills.desc: Attacks all enemies 4 times. Places a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff on the Demon for 2 turns.

skills.name: Infernal Resilience [P]
skills.desc:
Decreases the damage the Demon Lord receives from <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> and <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs, as well as Skills that inflict damage based on enemy MAX HP.

Immune to <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, and <color=#1ee600>[Decrease SPD]</color> debuffs, as well as MAX HP destruction effects, Turn Meter reduction effects, and HP exchange effects.

skills.name: Gathering Fury [P]
skills.desc: Starting from <color=#1ee600>the 10th turn</color>, the damage inflicted by all Skills increases each Turn. Damage increases by the same percentage each Turn, and accumulates over multiple Turns. Starting from <color=#1ee600>the 20th Turn</color>, damage is increased by a greater amount. Starting from <color=#1ee600>the 50th Turn</color>, all attacks will ignore any <color=#1ee600>Block Damage</color> and <color=#1ee600>Unkillable</color> buffs on each target.

skills.name: Clan Boss Cont damage resistance I
Almighty Immunity [P]
skills.desc: Immune to <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Block Active Skills]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Block Passive Skills]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Berserk]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Enfeeble]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Nullify]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Ensnare]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fatigue]</color>, and <color=#1ee600>[Hunter's Gaze]</color> debuffs. Also immune to HP exchange effects, HP balancing effects, and cooldown increasing effects.

skills.name: Unfaltering Speed [P]
skills.desc: Immune to <color=#1ee600>[Decrease SPD]</color> debuffs and Turn Meter reduction effects.
